---
title: "Two Guardians; or, Home in this World, The By the author of “Henrietta’s Wish,” “Kenneth,” etc."
---

## Two Guardians; or, Home in this World, The By the author of “Henrietta’s Wish,” “Kenneth,” etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1852
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Joseph Masters, Aldersgate Street, and New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
